description: Migrate the Cloudflare plugin to use SDK utilities: replace manual globalThis access with getPageGlobal, replace manual token persistence with getAuthCache/setAuthCache/clearAuthCache, and replace manual waitForAuth with waitUntil.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/cloudflare && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Migrate Cloudflare plugin to SDK utilities
userStories.description: Replace Cloudflare's manual globalThis access, token persistence, and waitForAuth with SDK equivalents.
acceptanceCriteria: waitForCloudflareAuth uses waitUntil wrapped to return boolean
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/cloudflare/src/cloudflare-api.ts

Context:
1. Page global for reading bootstrap.atok — replace with getPageGlobal('bootstrap.atok').

2. Token persistence (getPersistedAccountId/setPersistedAccountId/clearPersistedAuth) — Cloudflare stores `{ accountId: string | null }`. Replace with:
- `getPersistedAccountId()` → `getAuthCache<{accountId: string | null}>('cloudflare')?.accountId ?? null`
- `setPersistedAccountId(id)` → `setAuthCache('cloudflare', { accountId: id })`
- `clearPersistedAuth()` → `clearAuthCache('cloudflare')`

3. waitForCloudflareAuth — standard polling pattern.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change cloudflareApi() or any tool files
- Do NOT change account ID extraction from URL pathname
